title: Tag @everyone on this item/board or a Team triggers notification in "@ I was mentioned"
excerpt: When you tag @everyone on this item/board or a Team, would it be possible to have a notification display in the “@ I was mentioned” section?

posts.author: kelalaili (Karim El Alaili)
